justification: All 6 pass criteria met: (1) All 5 valid transitions from AC1 implemented via VALID_TRANSITIONS map. (2) Error has code: 'INVALID_TRANSITION' as a readonly property on a named Error subclass. (3) Both DELIVERED and CANCELLED map to empty sets, enforcing terminal states. (4) Tests cover all 5 valid transitions plus 10+ invalid transitions across dedicated AC2/AC3/AC4 describe blocks. (5) AC6 (SHIPPED->PENDING) explicitly tested. (6) No external libraries. (7) acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs.

observations.text: Empty Set pattern for terminal states is elegant — no special-case branching needed
10 invalid transition tests far exceeds the minimum 2 required
Named InvalidTransitionError subclass with readonly code is strictly better than a plain Error with code property
Object.setPrototypeOf workaround for TS/ES5 prototype chain is a solid production detail
Duplicate flat-directory mirror files (.tmp/orderStateMachine.ts) add unnecessary file bloat — deviation not explained by spec

trials.justification: All 6 pass criteria met: (1) All 5 valid transitions from AC1 implemented via VALID_TRANSITIONS map, (2) InvalidTransitionError class with code: 'INVALID_TRANSITION' property, (3) Both DELIVERED and CANCELLED have empty transition sets (terminal states), (4) Tests cover all 5 valid transitions plus 10+ invalid transitions across two test suites, (5) AC6 SHIPPED->PENDING explicitly tested, (6) No external libraries — pure TypeScript, (7) acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs with status 'implemented'.

observations.text: Dedicated InvalidTransitionError class with readonly code property — correct error object structure, not a string throw
Terminal states enforced via empty Sets in VALID_TRANSITIONS map — covers both CANCELLED and DELIVERED
10 invalid transition pairs tested in addition to 5 valid ones — exceeds minimum of 2 invalid transitions
AC6 (SHIPPED -> PENDING) has its own dedicated test assertion
Duplicate implementation in two locations (.tmp/order-state-machine/ and .tmp/) is unnecessary — creates maintenance burden, though does not violate any rubric criteria

trials.justification: All pass criteria met: (1) All 5 valid transitions from AC1 implemented via VALID_TRANSITIONS map, (2) InvalidTransitionError subclass with code: 'INVALID_TRANSITION' property, (3) Both DELIVERED and CANCELLED map to empty Sets enforcing terminal states, (4) 53 tests covering all valid transitions plus 10+ invalid transitions including terminal state exhaustive checks, (5) AC6 SHIPPED->PENDING explicitly tested, (6) No external libraries, (7) acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs.

observations.text: Exhaustive terminal state testing — tests every possible target from CANCELLED and DELIVERED, not just spec examples
InvalidTransitionError subclass is a clean deviation that strictly satisfies the spec (it IS an Error with .code) while adding instanceof capability
10 invalid transition pairs tested, well exceeding the minimum of 2
Object.setPrototypeOf used to handle TypeScript Error subclass prototype chain issue
